# Test basic HTTP server functionality with aggressive timeouts

# Set aggressive environment variables
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=1s

# Start HTTP server
bg bash 'go run main.go'
sleep 1s

# Test list_tools capability
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"tools/list\"}" | go run main.go
'
stdout '"name": "http_request"'
stdout '"name": "http_get"'
stdout '"name": "http_post"'

# Test GET request tool
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 2, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_get\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"https://httpbin.org/get\"}}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout '"status_code": 200'
stdout '"method": "GET"'

# Test POST request tool  
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 3, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_post\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"https://httpbin.org/post\", \"body\": \"{\\\"test\\\": true}\"}}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout '"status_code": 200'
stdout '"method": "POST"'

# Test invalid URL handling with timeout
bash '
echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 4, \"method\": \"tools/call\", \"params\": {\"name\": \"http_get\", \"arguments\": {\"url\": \"invalid-url\"}}}" | go run main.go
'
stdout 'error'

# Test server response time (should complete quickly)
bash 'start_time=$(date +%s%N); echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 5, \"method\": \"tools/list\"}" | go run main.go > /dev/null; end_time=$(date +%s%N); duration=$((($end_time - $start_time) / 1000000)); echo "Response time: ${duration}ms"; test $duration -lt 2000'

# Cleanup
exec pkill -f "go run main.go" || true
